description: Binary assertions for SKILL_NAME skill self-improvement

tests.name: test_case_1_descriptive_name
tests.prompt: Realistic user prompt that triggers this skill
tests.expected_output_description: Brief description of what correct output looks like

assertions.text: Output contains a markdown heading starting with ##
Output does not contain TODO or FIXME placeholders
Output includes at least one code block

_categories.format: Formatting: markdown, code blocks, lists, tables
_categories.length: Word count, line count, size constraints
_categories.forbidden: Patterns that must NOT appear in output
_categories.process: Correct ordering of steps, adherence to workflow

_assertion_rules: Every assertion MUST be binary: answerable with true or false
Be specific and measurable (count words, check patterns)
Cover: structure, content, format, length, forbidden, process
5-7 assertions per test case, 5 test cases total = 25-35 assertions
